sources.title: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Key West, April 1889
sources.institution: Library of Congress Geography and Map Division
sources.use: Pre-rail urban grid, waterfront, wharves, industrial uses, and shoreline context. Public domain.

sources.title: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Key West, April 1892
sources.institution: Library of Congress Geography and Map Division
sources.use: Close-spaced late-nineteenth-century comparison of blocks, waterfront structures, and industrial development. Public domain.

sources.title: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Key West, April 1899
sources.institution: Library of Congress Geography and Map Division
sources.use: Primary pre-Overseas-Railway urban and waterfront baseline. Public domain.

sources.title: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Key West, April 1912
sources.institution: Library of Congress Geography and Map Division
sources.use: First-railway-year urban record and priority source for Trumbo terminal, depot, wharf, and industrial reconstruction. Public domain.

sources.title: Admiralty Chart No. 1217, Florida Strait South Part
sources.coverage: Florida Strait, Keys, Cuba, and approaches; published 1890 with later corrections
sources.use: Regional navigation and reef context; candidate for a later controlled overlay rather than a city-scale shoreline layer.

sources.title: Harbor of Refuge, Key West, Florida
sources.institution: U.S. Army Corps of Engineers / U.S. Congress
sources.coverage: Key West Harbor and engineering works; 1913
sources.use: Post-rail harbor engineering, breakwater, channel, and proposed-basin context; priority georeferencing candidate.

sources.title: NAS Key West Boca Chica Field aerial, 1940s
sources.coverage: Boca Chica Field during the 1940s; published in Naval Aviation News, September 1947
sources.use: Public-domain wartime aviation landscape and Lower Keys development context.

sources.title: Key West aerial near Bertha Street and Atlantic Boulevard
sources.institution: Florida Keys Public Libraries / Wikimedia Commons
sources.coverage: Key West southeastern shoreline, dated broadly to the 1950s; MM00009236
sources.use: Mid-century shoreline and urban-edge comparison; licensed CC BY 2.0.
